economic_notes: Twatatya' Takenhas Inc. (TTI) is a wholly-owned GBE investing in on-reserve and off-reserve business ventures. TTI wholly owns Onyota'a:Ka Kahsatst^'Sla' Ltd. which operates a community solar microgrid. TTI holds a 9.1% interest in MySmartSimulations Inc. which has consecutive losses. Community benefit agreement related to Greenlane funding. Casino Rama (OFNLP) distributions invested in managed portfolio.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — the First Nation did not identify any ARO liabilities and the auditor could not quantify the impact. Long Term Care Home (TSI'Nu:Yoyantle'Na'Tuhuwatisni) is fully consolidated. TTI and OK Ltd. accounted for using modified equity method as GBE. Tangible capital assets net book value estimated from accumulated surplus invested in TCA ($32,357,129) plus net financial assets calculation. Emergency services expenditure $3,180,657 and Long Term Care $5,972,485 included in segment totals. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, Health Canada, Province of Ontario, and OFNLP transfers. total_government_transfers = ISC $26,054,916 + Health Canada $8,895,420 + Province of Ontario $16,703,120 + OFNLP $2,170,269 = $53,823,725. Deferred revenue note shows prior year deferred revenue drawn down and current year amounts deferred, resulting in net revenue recognition. Large increase in portfolio investments ($13.3M) and operations reserve fund ($21.2M vs $9.2M prior year).
